features: üåà Medium Gift Bags for Present - The present bag for both women and man is 29cm(H) x 10cm(W) x 22cm(L) in size, which is perfect for medium gifts. In addition, there are 2pcs tissue papers to decorate your gifts and 2pcs greeting cards to write down your best wishes to your dear families or friends.

üåà New Elegance Design - The paper gift bag are simple color but senior style. This stylish gift bag comes with a ribbon to tight a knot adding a luxurious finish to your gifting. The paper gift bags for birthday are simple but delicate, with handles and ribbon bow.

üåà Good Quality & Durable - These Paper present bags are made from good quality and thick cardboard, the bottom and handles have additional reinforcement, durable and sturdy, easy to take around and won't tear easily. This is the best choice for wrapping gifts.

üåà Suitale for Many Occasions - With it's elegant design, the plain gift bag can be widely used for both young boys/girls, kids, adult women or the elders. These beautiful and robust gift bags offer that extra touch of luxury to your gifts and social events such including baby shower, weddings, engagement, birthday party, bridal party, boutiques, Christmas, new years eve etc..

üåà Package Include - You will receive 2 pieces senior design gift bags, 2 gift card and 2 tissue papers. Each gift bag is accompanied by tissue paper, which adds an extra layer of elegance and surprise when unwrapping. It is ideal for medium-sized gifts for anniversary, bachelor party, back to school, congratulations, bridesmaid, groomsmen, celebrations, graduation, 18th, 20th, 50th birthday, valentines day.
